judgeScores.justification: The campaign demonstrates excellent thoroughness with all six deliverables fully realized and a consistent voice emphasizing calendar-aware lighting as a key differentiator. Specific strengths include platform-appropriate social content (visual Instagram guidance, professional LinkedIn tone) and persuasive feature-benefit mapping that directly addresses remote worker pain points like video call glare and eye strain. Weaknesses include a safe, somewhat forgettable tagline and occasional generic marketing language like 'luminous precision' that keeps the writing from being truly distinctive.
